MeasurementToolMetadata.Description: E-SWAN ADHD scale (items only; not scored)
MeasurementToolMetadata.LongName: 18 ADHD items. In this dataset responses are binary (0 = 'Quite a bit or Very much', 1 = 'Not at all or Just a little'). No summary score is released: the administered response format differs from the standard SWAN (-3 to 3) and the scoring could not be validated, so only the item responses are provided. See data-narrative.md.

swan_1.Description: Give close attention to detail and avoid careless mistakes

Levels.0: Quite a bit or Very much
Levels.1: Not at all or Just a little

swan_2.Description: Sustain (keep) attention on tasks or play activities

Levels.0: Quite a bit or Very much
Levels.1: Not at all or Just a little

Levels.0: Quite a bit or Very much
Levels.1: Not at all or Just a little

Levels.1: Not at all or Just a little

Levels.0: Quite a bit or Very much
Levels.1: Not at all or Just a little

Levels.0: Quite a bit or Very much
Levels.1: Not at all or Just a little

Levels.0: Quite a bit or Very much
Levels.1: Not at all or Just a little

Levels.1: Not at all or Just a little

Levels.1: Not at all or Just a little

Levels.0: Quite a bit or Very much
Levels.1: Not at all or Just a little

Levels.0: Quite a bit or Very much
